2025-03-01T12:05:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the Grand Opening at Kai Tak Sports Park, crowd management measures will be in place in Kai Tak and Sung Wong Toi stations tonight (1 March). One-way passenger flow will be implemented at specific entrances and exits. After the event, there may be additional waiting time to enter the station as passengers will enter in groups. MTR will increase the train frequency when necessary. Please be patient and allow sufficient time for your journey. For details, please Watch the video.
2025-03-01T12:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 為配合啟德體育園開幕，啟德及宋皇臺站今晚(3月1日)將實施客流管理措施，個別出入口會作單向進出安排。 活動散場時，乘客或需於站外等候分批進入車站。港鐵會按需要加密列車班次，請保持忍讓，耐心等候並為行程預留充裕時間。詳情請觀看短片【啟德體育園區—搭車攻略】。
